Class DepartmentService

java.lang.Object
de.hallerweb.enterprise.prioritize.service.company.DepartmentService

  • Method Details

    • saveDepartment

      public Department updateDepartment(Long id, Department departmentDetails, PUser requestingUser)

      public void deleteDepartment(Long id, PUser requestingUser)

    • getDepartmentById

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Department getDepartmentById(Long id)

    • getDepartmentsByCompany

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<Department> getDepartmentsByCompany(Long companyId, PUser requestingUser)

    • getAddress

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Address getAddress(Long id, PUser requestingUser)
      Reads the department's address as a detached copy, initialized inside this transaction (see CompanyService.getMainAddress(Long, PUser)). Returns null if the department has no address.

    • getAllDepartments

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<Department> getAllDepartments()
      Returns every department across all companies. Intended for admin-console screens (e.g. the role editor's optional department scope selector); carries no per-call authorization, mirroring getDepartmentById(Long) and the sibling admin services.

    • searchDepartments

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public List<Department> searchDepartments(String phrase)

    • getDepartmentByName

      @Transactional(readOnly=true) public Department getDepartmentByName(String name)

    • renameDepartment

      public void renameDepartment(Long id, String newName)
